deep_dive.title: From RGB Generation to Dense Field Readout: Pixel-Space Dense Prediction with Text-to-Image Models
deep_dive.abstract: Large-scale text-to-image models are attractive backbones for dense prediction because RGB generation pretraining learns rich semantic, structural, and geometric priors. Existing generative and editing approaches reuse these priors by casting dense prediction as target generation: annotations such as depth, normals, alpha mattes, masks, and heatmaps are encoded into an RGB-trained VAE latent space and decoded back as image-like targets. We argue this inherits more of the generative output interface than dense prediction requires: unlike RGB synthesis, dense prediction asks for pixel-correct, task-native fields on the same image plane, not new RGB content to be rendered. Our key observation is that a pretrained DiT already organizes RGB inputs through a patch-to-token-to-patch lattice on the image plane, so each token indexes a fixed output patch whose channels can carry task-native quantities instead of RGB appearance. We instantiate this as ReChannel: we keep the VAE encoder for the DiT's input distribution but drop the target-side decoder, adapt the frozen DiT with task LoRA, and map each token to its p x p x K_t pixel-space patch through a shared token-local linear head--about 33K parameters, no spatial mixing. Using FLUX-Klein, we evaluate on six dense prediction tasks and over a dozen benchmarks. This minimal interface sets new state-of-the-art on trimap-free matting, KITTI depth, and referring segmentation, and stays competitive on normals, saliency, and pose. In a matched 4B setting it is more accurate and 2.48x faster than an edit-plus-latent-decode counterpart--dense perception can benefit from generative pretraining without inheriting its output interface.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: discusses generating alpha mattes using text-to-image models in pixel space for dense prediction tasks
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 讨论使用文本到图像模型在像素空间生成alpha蒙版等密集预测任务
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 讨论使用文本到图像模型在像素空间生成alpha蒙版等密集预测任务
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 讨论使用文本到图像模型在像素空间生成alpha蒙版等密集预测任务
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: From RGB Generation to Dense Field Readout reuses text-to-image models to predict dense fields like alpha mattes directly in pixel space, avoiding generative decoding and improving efficiency for tasks including alpha channel prediction.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有密集预测方法将深度、法线、alpha蒙版等任务转化为RGB生成，继承了生成模型的输出接口但不够高效。本文指出这些任务需要像素精确的字段而非新RGB内容，提出从预训练DiT中直接读出像素空间稠密场的方法。对于生成透明视频所需的alpha通道预测，该方法提供了一条绕过完整生成的路劲，直接产生高质量alpha蒙版。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有密集预测方法将深度、法线、alpha蒙版等任务转化为RGB生成，继承了生成模型的输出接口但不够高效。本文指出这些任务需要像素精确的字段而非新RGB内容，提出从预训练DiT中直接读出像素空间稠密场的方法。对于生成透明视频所需的alpha通道预测，该方法提供了一条绕过完整生成的路劲，直接产生高质量alpha蒙版。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: techniques for generating transparent or alpha channel videos

quick_skim.title: Vidu S1: A Real-Time Interactive Video Generation Model
quick_skim.abstract: We introduce Vidu S1, a real-time interactive video generation model supporting voice control of digital characters. Users can control video generation content at any moment through voice instructions. Vidu S1 supports infinite-length real-time video generation without blurring, drift, or visual distortion. Built with TurboDiffusion and TurboServe, Vidu S1 outputs 540p real-time videos at up to 42 FPS on regular consumer GPUs. Users can upload custom images of real people, anime, and pets, and choose different voice tones for personalized experiences. Experiments show that Vidu S1 achieves the best performance across all test metrics while fully meeting real-time inference requirements. A playable online demo is available at https://vidu.com/vidu-stream.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Real-time interactive video generation model with impressive performance
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 实时交互视频生成模型，性能优异
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 实时交互视频生成模型，性能优异
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 实时交互视频生成模型，性能优异
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces Vidu S1, a real-time video generation model supporting voice control and infinite-length generation, achieving best performance on test metrics.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文介绍Vidu S1，一个支持语音控制、无限时长实时生成的视频生成模型，在多种测试指标上达到最优性能。其关注生成视频的质量与效率，与评估生成视频质量的需求直接相关，但未专门提出评价指标。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文介绍Vidu S1，一个支持语音控制、无限时长实时生成的视频生成模型，在多种测试指标上达到最优性能。其关注生成视频的质量与效率，与评估生成视频质量的需求直接相关，但未专门提出评价指标。
